summary:
When adequate bone buttressing is present, the AO system recommends rigid internal fixation to achieve absolute stability, allowing full load transfer and promoting primary intramembranous bone healing. This reflects the principle of load-bearing fixation, which enables optimal biomechanical performance and accelerated recovery compared to less stable methods.  

\boxed{B}

\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
